meaning: n.下部构造,基础下部组织
examples: Although South Africa has many of the attributes of the First World – some good infrastructure, millions of rich people – it is still not part of that world.
Simple improvements to infrastructure can reduce the spread of disease.
The key to seamlessness rests in infrastructure and information sharing.
The Corporate Market segment operates an ICT services and offering end-to-end solutions in infrastructure and network-related.
An ongoing programme, due for completion in 2015, is improving airstrip infrastructure across the country.
